use_cases: Website navigation showing user location in site hierarchy
E-commerce product category path display from homepage to current product
Admin dashboard breadcrumb trails for nested route navigation
Documentation or knowledge base page hierarchy navigation
File system or folder path visualization in document management UIs
ai_summary: A comprehensive shadcn-style breadcrumb navigation system built with Radix UI Slot primitive for flexible composition patterns. Features six sub-components including breadcrumb list, item, link, page (current), separator with chevron icons, and ellipsis for truncated paths. Full ARIA accessibility support with proper roles and labels, RTL layout compatibility, and Tailwind CSS styling for seamless integration into any application.
